nasb.text: except that the Holy Spirit solemnly testifies to me in every city, saying that bonds and afflictions await me.

esv.text: except that the Holy Spirit testifies to me in every city that imprisonment and afflictions await me.

cnv.text: 只知道在各城裡聖靈都向我指明，說有捆鎖和患難在等著我。

ccb.text: 只知道圣灵在各城镇指示我，前面必有监禁和苦难等着我。

csbs.text: 只知道在各城里圣灵向我郑重地做见证说，有捆锁和患难等着我。
